description: An IT auditor reviews the process for making changes to production systems.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of 20 recent changes from the change management system log.

expected_outcome.expected: A sample of changes is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each change, verify that it was tested and approved in a formal change advisory board (CAB) meeting before being deployed.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor finds one emergency change that bypassed the standard approval process.

nodes.task_description: Review the documentation for the emergency change to ensure it was approved by executive management, as per policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms the emergency change had the required VP-level approval.
